title: Harder Mobs
description: Makes mobs be faster, stronger and have more hp and both nerfing and buffing different aspects of them.
body:
Changes mob attributes to make them a bit more difficult to fight and to balance a bit. Example:  pigs and cows have different health and speed, evokers are faster but have less health and iron golems are stronger but a bit slower. Mostly made since a lot of mods add really powerful weapons and it makes normal mobs feel a bit to easy. 

Changelog:

  Version 1.1-patch:
  - Player stats aren't changed anymore.
  - Affects nearly every vanilla mob.

  Version 1.2:
  - Increased speed for a few mobs
  - Changed wither skeletons to match skeletons
  - Changed damage for endermen to be slightly more than normal.

  Version 1.2.5:
  - Changed iron golems to have an armor value similar to iron armor.
  - Changed iron golems to do slightly more damage than a ravager but be slower.
  - Increased snow golems health to 12
  - Changed a few health values. (Iron Golems, snow golems, giants)

  Version 1.3:
  - Buffed Warden to make the health ratio between it and the wither match better.
  - Increased warden damage to balance out its health to damage ratio.
